assertions.title: Sign up with email and password

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard

evidence.network: N/A - request blocked by rate limit

assertions.issues: Supabase email rate limit exceeded - cannot create new accounts for testing. The error appears immediately after form submission.

assertions.title: Sign in with email and password
assertions.issues: Database error querying schema - Supabase connection or schema issue prevents authentication. Cannot test signin flow without working database connection.

assertions.title: Duplicate email sign-up shows error

steps.observed: Rate limit error prevents account creation
Could not reach this step due to rate limit

assertions.issues: Cannot test duplicate email error because rate limit prevents creating the initial account needed for the test. Requires an existing account to test against.

assertions.title: Empty form submission shows validation errors

steps.action: Click Sign Up button with empty fields
steps.observed: Email is required and Password is required errors shown inline

steps.action: Click Sign In button with empty fields
steps.observed: Email is required and Password is required errors shown inline

evidence.network: No network request fired (client-side validation prevented submission)

frictions.description: Supabase email rate limit is very restrictive - blocks all signup attempts after just a few tries, making it difficult to test signup flows
Database error 'querying schema' on signin attempts suggests either Supabase connection issues or schema problems
Email validation on signup form rejected emails with '+' subaddressing (e.g., test+uuid@example.com), which is commonly used for test isolation
frictions.resolution: Used simple email format without '+' character

blockers.description: Supabase email rate limit exceeded - backend returns 'email rate limit exceeded' error on all signup attempts. Rate limit appears to require significant cooldown time (30+ seconds was insufficient).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 30+ seconds between attempts, used unique emails with timestamps, tried multiple email formats. Rate limit persisted.

blockers.description: Database error querying schema on signin attempts - Supabase auth returned 'Database error querying schema' when attempting to authenticate. This suggests a backend/database connectivity issue.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 10+ seconds and retried, used different test credentials. Error persisted.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-AUTH-009), 3 blocked (VAL-AUTH-002, VAL-AUTH-003, VAL-AUTH-008). The empty form validation works correctly on both signup and signin pages with inline error messages. However, Supabase rate limiting and database errors prevented testing the actual signup and signin flows. The validation for empty fields is client-side and prevents network requests as expected.
